name: Textured Metal Table Lamp - Threshold™
description:
Create a glowing space while adding visual interest with the Textured Metal Table Lamp from Threshold™. This white table lamp features a cone-shape shade set atop a textured metal base for an elegant appeal. Designed with a one-way on and off light setting, this table lamp comes with a lamp-pole turn-knob rotary switch for easy operation.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
